economic_notes: Odawa Stone Limited Partnership operates a stone quarry. Odawa Freshwater Limited Partnership holds 25% interest in Odawa Island Farm Limited Partnership. Investments in U.C.C.M. Building Material Supply Limited Partnership (14.28%), M'Nidoo M'Nising Power Limited Partnership (16.665%), and Great Lakes Hospitality Group Partnership (11.75%). COVID-19 declared March 11, 2020 with potential future financial impacts noted.
notes: Fiscal year is 2020 (March 31, 2020). Four government business enterprises accounted for using modified equity method: Odawa Stone Limited Partnership, 2294669 Ontario Limited, Odawa Freshwater Limited Partnership, and Odawa Freshwater General Partner Inc. Net loss in business enterprises of $161,695 included in revenue as a negative line. Total government transfers calculated as Federal ($1,715,643) + Provincial ($789,015) = $2,504,658; Kinoomaadziwin Education Body ($1,142,649) treated as OSR as it is an education body transfer rather than direct government transfer — note this classification may vary. Great Lakes Hospitality Group Partnership investment impaired. COVID-19 impact note included. No schedule of remuneration provided. Net debt of $236,201 reported on statement of changes in net debt. Balance sheet detail for current assets/liabilities not fully itemized in extracted text.
